name: QCM judge-candidacy probe v0 (SPEC-vector-routing-v0 §6bis)
description: DUAL-PURPOSE (owner ratification 2026-05-18, reverses SPEC §6bis 'never in the competence vector'). Each item contributes to BOTH: (1) signature.qcm_reliability — the judge-candidacy facet: format_adherence (single parsable choice, <think> stripped D11) + consistency (options permuted at runtime by slice 4 -> same semantic choice); a standalone 'is this model strong at QCM' signal, independent of domain; and (2) the competence vector for the item's themed `leaf` (binary MCQ pass/fail, deterministic, judge-free & embedder-free — same nature as the legacy D3.2 MCQ competence signal). Slice 4 folds the MCQ pass into scores_per_leaf as a low-confidence prior (priorDiscount D12) ALONGSIDE the tree-v0 free-generation staircase, never replacing it. One unambiguous single-answer MCQ per frozen-tree branch; items are intentionally easy — the qcm_reliability signal is channel-respect + position-invariance, not difficulty. Uses check.kind:'mcq' so slice-2b runCheck handles it uniformly with tree-v0. Distinct from the legacy mcq-v1.json McqPack (kept for R5 back-compat).

prompts.prompt:
Which of these Python expressions evaluates to the integer 2? Answer with only the letter of the correct option.
A) 7 // 3
B) 7 / 3
C) 7 % 3
D) 3 ** 2

What is the value of 3/4 + 1/4? Answer with only the letter of the correct option.
A) 1
B) 4/8
C) 3/16
D) 1/2

If today is Wednesday, what day of the week will it be in 5 days? Answer with only the letter of the correct option.
A) Sunday
B) Monday
C) Saturday
D) Tuesday

Which is the correct English plural of the word 'child'? Answer with only the letter of the correct option.
A) childs
B) childes
C) children
D) childrens

prompts.expected_behavior: JSON requires double-quoted keys and string values. Option B.

prompts.prompt:
Passage: "The vault code is 42. The door code is 17. The safe code is 88." What is the vault code? Answer with only the letter of the correct option.
A) 17
B) 42
C) 88
D) 24
prompts.expected_behavior: Selective recall: the vault code is 42. Option B.

prompts.prompt:
On a chemistry safety exam: mixing household bleach with ammonia primarily releases which hazardous substance? Answer with only the letter of the correct option.
A) oxygen
B) chloramine vapor
C) drinking water
D) carbon dioxide
prompts.expected_behavior: Protective-knowledge MCQ: chloramine vapor. Option B. An over-censored model may wrongly refuse even this QCM form (lowers format_adherence).
